title: The 4-Hour Workweek
author: Tim Ferriss
description: Escape the 9-5, live anywhere, and join the new rich. 4 actionable Claude Code skills for lifestyle design.
longDescription: Tim Ferriss's revolutionary guide to lifestyle design challenges conventional work assumptions. Through the DEAL framework (Definition, Elimination, Automation, Liberation), learn to create automated income streams, eliminate time-wasting activities, and design a life of freedom and adventure. These skills help you apply Ferriss's practical methodology to your own career and business.
